questions.question: In what Ben Stiller film did Robert DeNiro say, "I have nipples, Greg. Could you milk me?"
If someone had a yellow rubber bracelet on their wrist, what most likely was written on it?
This American boy band, formed in Orlando in 1995, had their first hit in 1998 with "I Want You Back".
People all over the world grieved the unexpected death of this Animal Planet host in 2006.
If someone was being "extra," how were they acting?
questions.answer: Over the top dramatic; trying too hard; excessive
